mapper.select:
select * from ( SELECT com.id id, com.id companyId, com.company_name companyName, com.province_code provinceCode, com.register_capital registerCapital, com.supplier_rating supplierRating, com.supplier_level supplierLevel, com.supplier_grade supplierGrade, com.supplier_delivery supplierDelivery, com.created_date createdDate, con.tradeCount, con.tradeTonnes, con.buyUnitPrice, con.buyTotalAmount, con.premium, con.grossProfitMargin, con.lastContractTime, con.firstContractTime, if(com.dept_id is not null,com.dept_id,max_con.deptId) deptId, if(com.match_user_id is not null,com.match_user_id,max_con.matchUserId) matchUserId, con.breachDays, con.tradeTonnesSell, con.tradeTonnesBuy, con.sellUnitPrice, con.sellTotalAmount FROM t_bs_company com left JOIN ( SELECT SUM(buy.breach_days) breachDays, SUM(sell.total_number) tradeTonnesSell, SUM(buy.total_number) tradeTonnesBuy, SUM(sell.total_amount) / SUM(sell.total_number) sellUnitPrice, SUM(sell.total_amount) sellTotalAmount, COUNT( 1 ) tradeCount, SUM( buy.total_number ) tradeTonnes, SUM( buy.total_amount ) / SUM( buy.total_number ) buyUnitPrice, SUM( buy.total_amount ) buyTotalAmount, SUM( sell.total_amount ) / SUM( sell.total_number ) - SUM( buy.total_amount ) / SUM( buy.total_number ) premium, (SUM(sell.total_amount)-SUM(buy.total_amount))/SUM(buy.total_amount) grossProfitMargin, MAX( buy.contract_time ) lastContractTime, MIN( buy.contract_time ) firstContractTime, buy.company_id companyId, buy.dept_id deptId FROM t_ctr_contract buy JOIN t_ctr_contract sell ON buy.pair_code = sell.pair_code WHERE buy.contract_status != 'C' AND buy.contract_type = 'B' AND buy.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sell.contract_type = 'S' AND sell.business_type = 'ZY-BB'
and sell.match_user_id NOT IN
#{notUserIds[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY buy.company_id ) con on com.id = con.companyId LEFT JOIN ( SELECT buy.company_id companyId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(buy.dept_id ORDER BY buy.contract_time DESC), ',', 1) AS deptId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(buy.contract_time ORDER BY buy.contract_time DESC), ',', 1) AS lastContractTime, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(buy.match_user_id ORDER BY buy.contract_time DESC), ',', 1) AS matchUserId FROM t_ctr_contract buy JOIN t_ctr_contract sell ON buy.pair_code = sell.pair_code WHERE buy.contract_status != 'C' AND buy.contract_type = 'B' AND buy.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sell.contract_type = 'S' AND sell.business_type = 'ZY-BB'
and buy.match_user_id NOT IN
#{notUserIds[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY buy.company_id ) max_con ON con.companyId = max_con.companyId AND con.lastContractTime = max_con.lastContractTime LEFT JOIN ( SELECT buy.company_id companyId, MIN( buy.contract_time ) firstContractTime FROM t_ctr_contract buy JOIN t_ctr_contract sell ON buy.pair_code = sell.pair_code WHERE buy.contract_status != 'C' AND buy.contract_type = 'B' AND buy.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sell.contract_type = 'S' AND sell.business_type = 'ZY-BB'
and buy.match_user_id NOT IN
#{notUserIds[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY buy.company_id ) min_con ON con.companyId = min_con.companyId AND con.firstContractTime = min_con.firstContractTime
where com.company_type='T' ) com_result where 1=1
and com_result.deptId in
#{deptIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
order by com_result.lastContractTime desc

select * from ( SELECT com.id id, com.id companyId, com.company_name companyName, com.province_code provinceCode, com.register_capital registerCapital, com.supplier_rating supplierRating, com.supplier_level supplierLevel, com.supplier_grade supplierGrade, com.supplier_delivery supplierDelivery, com.created_date createdDate, cbe.breach_days breachDays, cbe.trade_count tradeCount, cbe.trade_tonnes_sell tradeTonnesSell, cbe.trade_tonnes_buy tradeTonnesBuy, cbe.trade_tonnes_buy tradeTonnes, cbe.sell_unit_price sellUnitPrice, cbe.sell_total_amount sellTotalAmount, cbe.buy_unit_price buyUnitPrice, cbe.buy_total_amount buyTotalAmount, cbe.premium premium, cbe.gross_profit_margin grossProfitMargin, cbe.last_contract_time lastContractTime, cbe.first_contract_time firstContractTime, cbe.dept_id deptId, cbe.match_user_id matchUserId, cbe.match_user_name matchUserName, cbe.common_brand_number commonBrandNumber FROM t_bs_company com LEFT JOIN t_company_business_expansion cbe on com.id = cbe.company_id
where com.company_type='T' ) com_result where 1=1
and com_result.deptId in
#{deptIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
order by com_result.lastContractTime desc

SELECT COUNT(1) totalCount,c.company_id companyId,p.brand_number brandNumber,p.product_name productName,p.factory_name factoryName FROM t_ctr_contract c INNER JOIN t_ctr_product p on c.id = p.ctr_contract_id WHERE c.contract_status != 'C' and c.contract_type='B' and c.business_type='ZY-BB'
and b.match_user_id NOT IN
#{notUserIds[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY c.company_id,p.brand_number ORDER BY c.company_id ASC,COUNT(1) DESC
